name: PKOS Bridge
description: Bridge surfaces for PKOS, Workbench, and OpenClaw handoff flows.

pkosRoot.label: PKOS Root
pkosRoot.help: Absolute path to the PKOS workspace root used by this bridge.

workbenchRoot.label: Workbench Root
workbenchRoot.help: Absolute path to the Workbench workspace root that produces trace bundles.

traceBundleRoot.label: Trace Bundle Root
traceBundleRoot.help: Directory watched or written by the bridge for trace bundle exchange.

guidance.enabled.label: Enable Bridge Guidance
guidance.enabled.help: Inject OpenClaw role-boundary guidance so the bridge stays aligned with PKOS contracts.

http.basePath.label: Bridge HTTP Base Path
http.basePath.help: Gateway route prefix exposed by the bridge plugin.
